observation: Shipped creator-line-token-alignment-route (PR #70): aligned --line token across warm-paper family toward consensus rgba(21,18,14,0.18) — pdf-zine (22,19,14→21,18,14), poster-surface (.16→0.18), prompt-dna/social-card (whitespace normalize). --line converges 11→8 distinct values. All gates MAXXED (316/316 hackathon, 11/11 cache-integrity, 4/4 surface checks). Promoted to retained_routes. Selected creator-muted-token-alignment-route. Added creator-paper-token-alignment-route as new 4th candidate.
population: creator CSS token alignment and visual grammar unification across 11 surfaces toward DASH creative-engine warmth + industrial-brutalist constraint + zine-like economy
selection_pressure: move from proof coherence (all gates green) to aesthetic coherence (shared visual DNA recognizable across surfaces) — tighten shared tokens without homogenizing per-surface creative roles

candidates.mutation: Add regression noise filtering (bun creator:regression-filter) that suppresses known pre-existing bun-types lint noise in regression output, producing a clean PASS/FAIL surface report.
candidates.risk: Blocked: regression is currently clean, no noise to filter. May become relevant if bun-types updates introduce new pre-existing lint noise.

candidates.mutation: Dark mode toggle for creator surfaces. DESELECTED 2026-05-16: all surfaces already dark industrial-brutalist palette.
candidates.phenotype: Global dark mode CSS + toggle button
candidates.risk: Deselected 2026-05-16: all 11 surfaces already use dark industrial-brutalist palette.

candidates.mutation: Align the --muted token across warm-paper family toward #6f6659 consensus. Current state: 10 distinct values across 12 surfaces (was 9 before touchdesigner added --muted:#7ea0ac). Warm-paper consensus is #6f6659 (shared by family-dna, motion-storyboard, social-card). Dark-industrial: #94a69f (browser-demo), #7a7164 (remotion-scene). creative-hybrid: #8b9ab1 (manim), #7ea0ac (touchdesigner). Align warm-paper surfaces first (6 surfaces), respecting creative intent divergence (p5-sketch uses #6f6a5f — 1-hex-digit drift).
candidates.phenotype: Updated :root --muted values on warm-paper surfaces with measure+print verification + updated QA evidence.
candidates.risk: p5-sketch --muted:#6f6a5f is only 1 hex digit away from consensus #6f6659 — likely copy-paste drift, not creative intent. pdf-zine --muted:#6f6558 is 2 digits away. Verify browser appearance does not shift on warm-paper family before merging.

candidates.mutation: Align the --paper token across warm-paper family toward #f2eadb consensus. Current state: 7 distinct values across 10 surfaces. Warm-paper consensus #f2eadb is shared by motion-storyboard (aligned in PR #64), prompt-dna, and family-dna. Drifted surfaces include pdf-zine (#f4ead8), poster-surface (#f1eadc), social-card (#f3eadb), p5-sketch (#f6f0e5). All are within visual range — the --paper migration is about tightening the family texture to the exact consensus hex.
candidates.phenotype: Updated :root --paper values on warm-paper surfaces with measure+print verification + updated QA evidence.
candidates.risk: All warm-paper --paper values are already in the #f2-#f6 range — visual shift will be subtle. The risk is NOT breaking anything; it is whether the delta is worth the ledger churn at this precision. Surface-consistency convergence report must confirm --paper distinct count reduces measurably.
